context.brief_excerpt:
SYSTEM HEALTH CHECK - Monitor all infrastructure. SDK fork form, no prior context. This brief is the entire context.

VERIFY-BEFORE-DECLARE-DONE: Probe destination substrate (status_board / kv_store / Neo4j / file on disk / Stripe / Vercel / GitHub) BEFORE writing your [FORK_REPORT]. "Logged" without an artefact is symbolic logging.

DO NOT POST to /api/os-session/message, DO NOT pm2_restart ecodia-api (would kill conductor), DO NOT send client-facing comms unless explicitly authorised.

End wit
